positive: A symmetrical, ornate circular medallion illustration featuring stylized cosmic flora and fauna. Central composition showcasing intertwining elements: delicate, bioluminescent foxglove flowers, crystalline geometric vines, and small, stylized moon moths with iridescent wings. The aesthetic is a blend of Art Nouveau engraving and vintage scientific taxonomy plates, rendered in a high-contrast, deep indigo, emerald green, and antique gold palette. Clean, solid silhouettes against a negative space background. Perfect for repeating pattern or single-art graphic design, printed on apparel. Intricate linework, crosshatching detail, highly detailed engraving style, vector quality.
